name: report_clock_utilization
short_description: Report information about clock nets in design
full_help:
report_clock_utilization

Description: 
Report information about clock nets in design

Syntax: 
report_clock_utilization  [-file <arg>] [-append] [-write_xdc <arg>]
                          [-cells <args>] [-clock_roots_only] [-return_string]
                          [-name <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
Report

Usage: 
  Name                 Description
  --------------------------------
  [-file]              Filename to output results to. (send output to console
                       if -file is not used)
  [-append]            Append to existing file
  [-write_xdc]         File to output clock constraint. File name must be 
                       given.
  [-cells]             Cells/bel_instances for which to report clock 
                       utilization
  [-clock_roots_only]  Report only the Clock Root Assignments
  [-return_string]     Return report as string
  [-name]              Output the results to GUI panel with this name
  [-quiet]             Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]           Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report, Timing
